## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (incl. the 5 fixed-seed property tests)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Coverage for touched core modules stays ≥ 90%
- [ ] Public API changes are documented (doc comments + README) and kept minimal
- [ ] Types are imported from `src/types.ts` (no duplicate type declarations)
- [ ] Change is within scope (generic resilience only — no compliance/version gating)
- [ ] Commits use Conventional Commits and are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
